programs.title: Haunted Case Files
programs.desc: Investigators are attacked by the ghost of a sadistic nurse at an abandoned hospital; a seemingly perfect home harbors an unwelcome guest; a father-daughter team is subjected to a torrent of abuse from the spirits of former inmates.

programs.title: Haunted Case Files
programs.desc: Things turn ugly inside a beauty salon for a veteran investigator and his team; a ghost hunter discovers that a remote island is alive with history; investigators unleash evil while investigating a historic home.

programs.desc: Jay and Marie investigate Arizona tunnels; the Tolfs investigate a former jail in Michigan; Shannon encounters spirits in a house.
